Article – NY Times
Clay allows employees to sell shares at a $5b valuation.
Get a demo
Sign up
Go to market with unique data — and the ability to act on it
Bring AI agents, enrichment, and intent data together and turn insights into relevant, timely action.
Start building for free
Trusted by more than 500,000 leading GTM teams of all sizes.
Built with love. Inspired by our customers.
4.9
40K +
GTME community
5.0
Hackathon
A full
AI GTM hackathon
focused on building real things:
social listening tools
,
personalized graphic generation at scale
, and
dramatically improved EMEA phone number coverage
with Clay and Canva.
Case study
Clay should be an
essential pillar of every company's GTM stack
, enabling outbound built on the highest quality data foundation possible.
CRO
Stevie Case
Case study
Clay is helping us nail the fundamentals: who to target, how to identify them, and how to automate the administrative parts of getting that data into a salesperson's hands
Director of GTM Ops
Alexander DeMoulin
Hackathon
Our first
AI Hackathon week in SF with Google
brought builders together to move fast and build real things. Working side by side, we unlocked data across YouTube, Ads, Cloud, Intrinsic, and CapitalG, and turned it into
AI workflows that are practical, powerful, and ready to use
.
Case study
Clay enables our team to rapidly experiment with trigger driven workflows, and 3rd party enrichment data.
We’re able to move fast and drive outsized impact on GTM execution
– all while using a tool that’s fun, creative, and cutting edge.
Revenue Strategy & Data
Scotty Huhn
Case study
"Every lead is pre-qualified, scored on unique signals, and routed automatically through Clay. We're now generating pipeline from segments we weren't even touching before."
Growth
Raman Khanna
Case study
Clay is a game changer for marketing, data, and operations.
We have 3x our enrichment rate with Clay’s combination of data providers
vs. our previous solution.
Head of Sales Operations
Adam Wall
Case study
Clay is the Rippling marketing team's
secret weapon
. It has helped us build an experimentation-driven GTM motion that iterates on ideas and scales what works. We've achieved breakthrough outbound email performance, deeply enriched our customer base with AI, and more.
VP, Corporate Integrated Marketing
Ryan Narod
Case study
Clay has become the orchestration layer for everything GTM. Salesforce for record-keeping, Snowflake for product data, and Clay for turning it all into automated action.
Marketing Operations
Kyle Ketchum
Case study
Clay is a central part of our outbound campaign program. It’s helped us fully automate lead enrichment that previously required expensive and time consuming manual research.
Director of Growth
Davide Grieco
Every GTM data point imaginable, in one place
Understand your total market, your customers, and the gap between them. Then act on it.
Enrichments:
Access premium data from 150+ providers: identify new leads, score accounts and contacts, and personalize outreach.
Intent signals:
Take instant action when prospects change jobs, visit your website, mentions your company online, and more.
AI-led research:
Search public databases, navigate gated forms, and find unique datapoints with
Claygent
.
>2x
OpenAI more than doubled enrichment coverage from low 40% to high 80%.
AI that’s contextual, consistent, and scalable
Create and scale context-aware AI agents, and launch GTM workflows effortlessly.
From idea to workflow:
Chat with Sculptor for GTM idea generation, analysis, and table building.
Build Claygents to scale:
Build and version multiple AI agents and reuse them across workflows for consistency at scale.
Bring your own context:
Connect Claygent to any MCP server - from Salesforce, to Gong, to Google Docs, to enrich with deeper business context.
3x
3x’d data coverage on contact information, firmographics, and more.
Orchestrate and act on your data, at scale
Bring together enrichments, intent signals, and CRM data, decide who to go after, and trigger action automatically.
Act on your data at scale:
Sync millions of CRM records with signals from 150+ providers.
Build dynamic audiences:
Combine signals, enrichment, and CRM data and create high-intent buyer segments.
Time outreach perfectly:
Alert reps, update your CRM, or launch outreach campaigns in Clay’s native sequencer.
3M+
Automated monitoring buying signals from 3M+ companies to prioritize outreach.
Turn data into action with flexible,
iterable workflows
Getting the right data is only half the battle: the real value comes from putting it into action. Connect your data to any tool i

Get a demo
Sign up
Clay changelog
New at Clay
Highlighted features
Clay in ChatGPT
Clay in ChatGPT lets you find people, enrich contacts, and draft personalized outreach — all within a regular ChatGPT conversation.
Learn more
Turn Gong conversations into automated GTM workflows
Announcing the new Gong and Clay integration.
Clay integrates with Webflow, unlocking scalable website personalization for GTM teams
Introducing the new Webflow and Clay integration
Apr 15, 2026
Functions
Feature highlight
Beta
Functions
‍
Build your GTM logic once and reuse it across every table, audience, and workflow in Clay.
‍
Learn more
Mar 30, 2026
Attio
Feature highlight
Beta
Attio
Pull Attio records into Clay as a source and push enriched data back by creating, updating, or upserting across any object — keeping your CRM complete and current automatically.
‍
Learn more
Mar 27, 2026
Delay Runs
Feature highlight
Beta
Delay Runs
Set a configurable delay of up to 10 minutes before enrichment cells execute, giving third-party systems time to process upstream changes.
‍
Learn more
Mar 23, 2026
Table Versioning and Changelog
Feature highlight
Beta
Table Versioning and Changelog
Track changes to your table's structure and configuration over time, maintain visibility into who made those changes, and restore previous states whenever you need them.
Learn more
Mar 10, 2026
Beauhurst Integration: Private Company Financials, Funding, and Corporate Structure for UK & Germany
Feature highlight
Beta
Beauhurst Integration: Private Company Financials, Funding, and Corporate Structure for UK & Germany
Access deep private company data for the UK and Germany — including funding rounds that never get publicly announced — to identify and act on commercial inflection points before competitors.
‍
Learn more
Mar 10, 2026
Lusha Integration: Verified Contact Data, Lookalike Prospecting, and Signal-Informed Enrichment
Feature highlight
Beta
Lusha Integration: Verified Contact Data, Lookalike Prospecting, and Signal-Informed Enrichment
Enrich contacts and companies, find lookalike prospects, and signal-informed enrichment using Lusha's verified B2B data — all inside Clay.
‍
Learn more
Show More
Turn your growth ideas into reality today
Start your 14-day Pro trial today. No credit card required.
Start building for free
Get a demo
Go to market with unique data—and the ability to act on it
Start building for free

analysis.name: Clay
analysis.tagline: Go to market with unique data—and the ability to act on it
analysis.value_proposition: Clay aggregates 150+ data providers into a single GTM automation platform so sales and marketing teams can research, enrich, and act on prospect data without manual work.
analysis.ideal_customer: B2B GTM teams (sales ops, revenue ops, growth marketing) running outbound, ABM, or CRM enrichment at scale

features.name: claygents
features.description: AI agents that autonomously research target companies and people across the web
features.evidence_quote: Research target companies and people with AI

features.name: waterfall enrichment
features.description: Cascades queries across multiple data providers in priority order to maximize field coverage
features.evidence_quote: Combine multiple data providers for the best coverage

features.name: signals and intent tracking
features.description: Monitors real-time triggers such as job changes, promotions, and new hires to surface buying intent
features.evidence_quote: Track job changes promotions or other signals

features.name: data marketplace
features.description: Single marketplace giving access to 150+ third-party data providers without separate contracts
features.evidence_quote: Buy data from 150+ providers in one place

features.name: ads audience sync
features.description: Syncs enriched, targeted audiences directly to LinkedIn, Meta, and Google ad platforms
features.evidence_quote: Sync targeted ad audiences to Linkedin, Meta, and Google

features.name: audience management
features.description: Centralizes first-party and third-party data sources into unified audiences inside Clay
features.evidence_quote: Centralize your first and third party data sources in Clay

features.name: native sequencer
features.description: Built-in email/outreach sequencer; can also trigger external sequencing tools
features.evidence_quote: Use Clay's native sequencer or automate messaging

features.name: sculptor (natural language workflow builder)
features.description: Build GTM workflows by describing them in plain English; AI constructs the automation
features.evidence_quote: Build GTM workflows with natural language

features.name: functions
features.description: Custom formula/function layer for transforming and manipulating data inside tables
features.evidence_quote: Functions

features.name: ai formatting
features.description: AI-assisted formatting and normalization of raw data fields
features.evidence_quote: AI formatting

features.name: clay mcp
features.description: Model Context Protocol integration allowing AI assistants (e.g. Claude, ChatGPT) to query Clay data
features.evidence_quote: Clay MCP

features.name: clay for salesforce
features.description: Native Salesforce integration for bidirectional sync of enriched data and workflow triggers
features.evidence_quote: Clay for Salesforce

features.name: crm enrichment
features.description: Automated enrichment and data hygiene pipelines that keep CRM records current at scale
features.evidence_quote: Keep your CRM clean with the highest quality data

features.name: web scraping
features.description: Code-free extraction of structured data from any website for use in enrichment workflows
features.evidence_quote: Extract structured data from any website, instantly and code-free.

features.name: inbound automation
features.description: Auto-enriches, scores, and triggers follow-up for inbound leads to minimize time-to-contact
features.evidence_quote: automatically enrich, score, and follow-up with inbound leads with Clay's inbound automation engine

features.name: abm workflows
features.description: Account-based marketing workflows combining signals, enrichment, and ad audience sync
features.evidence_quote: ABM

features.name: reverse etl
features.description: Push enriched and transformed Clay data back into warehouses or downstream systems
features.evidence_quote: Reverse ETL

features.name: tam sourcing
features.description: Build total addressable market lists from Clay's proprietary dataset and enrichment providers
features.evidence_quote: TAM sourcing

features.name: account research
features.description: Automated deep-dive research on target accounts aggregating multiple data signals
features.evidence_quote: Account research

features.name: territory planning
features.description: Tooling to segment and assign accounts into sales territories using enriched data
features.evidence_quote: Territory planning

features.name: rep prospecting
features.description: Helps individual sales reps build targeted prospect lists with enriched contact data
features.evidence_quote: Rep prospecting

features.name: rep assist
features.description: AI-assisted tooling for reps to accelerate research and personalization in-workflow
features.evidence_quote: Rep assist

features.name: plg assist
features.description: Identifies and prioritizes product-qualified leads from product usage signals for sales follow-up
features.evidence_quote: PLG assist

features.name: export
features.description: Send enriched data to spreadsheets, CRMs, Slack, or custom downstream workflows
features.evidence_quote: Send data anywhere: spreadsheets, CRM, Slack, or custom workflows.

features.name: gen ai content generation
features.description: Generate personalized messaging, insights, and summaries using AI inside Clay tables
features.evidence_quote: Generate content, insights, and automation using powerful AI capabilities.

features.name: workspace admin and permissions
features.description: Manage workspace controls, role-based permissions, billing, and user access
features.evidence_quote: Manage workspace controls, permissions, billing, and user access securely.

features.name: signals triggers and automation
features.description: Event-driven automation that fires workflows based on real-time signals
features.evidence_quote: Automate actions using real-time signals to react instantly and intelligently.

features.name: hubspot integration
features.description: Bidirectional sync with HubSpot CRM including import, enrichment, and action triggers
features.evidence_quote: Clay x HubSpot Actions

features.name: hg insights integration
features.description: Pulls technographic and install-base data from HG Insights for tech-stack-based targeting
features.evidence_quote: Diving deep into one of the most powerful enrichment providers in Clay's arsenal: HG Insights.

features.name: chatgpt integration
features.description: Clay available as a tool inside ChatGPT for querying and running enrichment workflows
features.evidence_quote: Clay in ChatGPT

features.name: clay university
features.description: Self-serve learning platform with courses, cohorts, certifications, and templates
features.evidence_quote: The fastest way to master Clay

features.name: cohort live classes
features.description: Instructor-led 1-week sprint cohorts for onboarding teams onto Clay
features.evidence_quote: A 1-week, instructor-led sprint. Learn together and finish knowing how to build with Clay

features.name: certifications
features.description: Formal Clay certifications demonstrating platform proficiency
features.evidence_quote: Certifications

features.name: use case templates
features.description: Pre-built workflow templates for common GTM use cases (outbound, enrichment, ABM, etc.)
features.evidence_quote: Use case templates

features.name: partner program
features.description: Structured partner ecosystem including solution partners, integration partners, and creator program
features.evidence_quote: Solution partners, Integration partners, Creator program

features.name: startup program
features.description: Discounted or subsidized access for early-stage startups
features.evidence_quote: Startup program

features.name: linkedin ads autopilot
features.description: Automated pipeline that builds and syncs LinkedIn ad audiences from Clay enrichment data
features.evidence_quote: LinkedIn + Meta Ads on Autopilot

features.name: proprietary company dataset
features.description: Clay maintains its own proprietary database of companies searchable within the platform
features.evidence_quote: Find companies that match your specific criteria within Clay's proprietary dataset.

features.name: prompt engineering tools
features.description: Built-in prompt engineering guidance and credit optimization for AI enrichment tasks
features.evidence_quote: Prompt Engineering Crash Course, Best Practices To Maximize Your Credits

differentiators: 150+ data providers accessible in a single marketplace without separate vendor contracts
Waterfall enrichment cascades across multiple providers to maximize coverage on any field
Natural language workflow builder (Sculptor) requires no code or technical setup
AI research agents (Claygents) that autonomously conduct company and people research
Native ad audience sync to LinkedIn, Meta, and Google directly from enriched data
Clay in ChatGPT — accessible as a tool inside ChatGPT for conversational GTM workflows
Clay MCP — Model Context Protocol support for integration with any MCP-compatible AI tool

free_tier.limits: unknown — sign-up CTA present but limits not visible in scraped content

tiers.name: unknown
tiers.headline_inclusions: Pricing page rendered only navigation; no tier names or prices were captured in source text

pricing.notes: Pricing page content did not render tier details in the scraped source — only navigation HTML was captured. Clay historically uses credit-based usage pricing layered on top of seat tiers. 'Get a demo' CTA suggests enterprise tier requires sales contact. Self-serve sign-up exists for lower tiers.
